item_name: Wash and bandage a minor cut completion note
prompt:
A process-specific completion note documenting washing and bandaging a minor cut. The image shows a clean first-aid setup with bandages, water or rinse supplies, and a small care log card with step icons and completion checkmarks implied by layout rather than readable text. Keep the scene non-graphic and focused on the supplies and result, emphasizing calm self-care and proper basic treatment.

Ultra-detailed, photorealistic 512×512 image with a grounded near-future home first-aid aesthetic: soft bathroom or tabletop lighting, realistic fabric bandage, paper packaging, and skin-safe material textures, no logos, no readable labels, no gore, and no identifiable faces. Keep the supplies and note centered and reassuring so the image reads as a safe completion artifact.
